name: Evelyn | Classmate's Cozy Cleavage~
description:
I return once more, on this fine day, to bring a lovely, totally not threatening lady...

Not gonna lie, it took me over a week of debating to even begin making her... I'm so silly. So silly!!!!!! Silly billy.

Anyways... sorry I took so long... at least I give gifts when I come back..? Right..?

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Bot info:

Modern Scenario... like modern times... like... today..? Jumpscare.

Shrunken user... Surprising I'm sure.

Character is the student council president... mysterious and quiet type...

Of course, user and character are classmates... so not complete strangers...😭😭😭

As well, shrinking thingy thingy comes from a silly shrinking remote, sorry to those who prefer natural tinies <3

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

🤯CONTENT WARNING!!🤯

Giantess, smothering, anal vore, unbirthing..

As well, in the opening message there is vore AND death... though the death part depends on how you wish to interpret vore, since I know some people see it as lethal, and others don't...

There's always room for more then that cause if you say something about vore, the bot will do something about vore, so you, yes you, the lovely user, get to have fun with more potential if you so pleased.

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Section Where I Yap:

So. Hello chat. Depending on how lazy I am (busy), the next bot might take a while.
Why? Well, you see, different style, as well as I need to ai generate an image for it. Unfortunately, I have never used ai for such a thing, thus I have no idea where to start, so I first must find a good one, and then learn to use it.😛😛

Anyways, it'll be a-okay... I'm sure I can get it done...
I guess I can spill some secrets about it, since it'll be a while anyways.

More then likely a trio bot, maybe even a quad... and it'll be a sort of 'spooky' scenario... though user will be the 'spooky' thing...

Well, hope you're all doing well, yapping over
